metadata.description: ASO & App Marketing skills for Claude Code — keyword research, metadata optimization, competitor analysis, and app growth. AppTweak MCP primary, Appeeky fallback.

plugins.name: aso-skills
plugins.description: 30 ASO and app marketing skills for indie developers, app marketers, and growth teams. Covers keyword research, metadata optimization, competitor analysis, market intelligence, chart tracking, screenshot design, review management, localization, user acquisition, monetization, and more. v1.1.0 adds AppTweak MCP as primary data source and encodes 1998 Cam production lessons (en-GB cascade check, Protected Token Set, monitoring ladder, rollback triggers).
